summary: Marketing Platform Links & Analytics Feature - All tests passed. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - Analytics summary, per-platform rows, edit mode, save/cancel functionality, 'Add Links' vs 'Update Links' states.
seed_data_creation: Test posts created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Links & Analytics feature fully tested. PUT /api/marketing/posts/{post_id}/links endpoint saves platform_links with url and analytics fields (views, likes, comments, shares, subscribers_added). Only accepts platforms assigned to the post. Validates numeric fields (invalid values converted to 0). Merges with existing links data. GET /api/marketing/posts/{post_id} returns platform_links in response. Frontend shows analytics summary totals when links exist, per-platform rows with individual breakdowns, 'Update Links' button for posts with links, 'Add Links' button for posts without links, edit mode with URL and analytics inputs, Save/Cancel buttons work correctly.

Backend_API_Tests.PUT_links_saves_url_and_analytics: PASSED - Saves platform_links with url, views, likes, comments, shares, subscribers_added
Backend_API_Tests.PUT_links_only_accepts_assigned_platform: PASSED - Ignores platforms not assigned to the post
Backend_API_Tests.PUT_links_merges_with_existing_data: PASSED - New data merges with existing platform_links
Backend_API_Tests.PUT_links_updates_existing_metrics: PASSED - Updates merge with existing platform metrics
Backend_API_Tests.PUT_links_invalid_format_returns_400: PASSED - Returns 400 for invalid platform_links format
Backend_API_Tests.GET_post_with_links_has_analytics: PASSED - Analytics data present in platform_links
Backend_API_Tests.GET_new_post_has_empty_links: PASSED - New posts have empty platform_links
Backend_API_Tests.PUT_links_zero_values: PASSED - Zero values accepted for analytics
Backend_API_Tests.PUT_links_large_values: PASSED - Large analytics values handled correctly

Frontend_UI_Tests.Post_detail_loads: PASSED - Post detail page loads with data-testid='marketing-post-detail'
Frontend_UI_Tests.Analytics_summary_shows_totals: PASSED - Shows Views, Likes, Comments, Shares, New Subs totals
Frontend_UI_Tests.Per_platform_rows_present: PASSED - Individual platform rows with analytics breakdowns
Frontend_UI_Tests.Open_link_button_for_platforms_with_urls: PASSED - External link button appears for platforms with URLs
Frontend_UI_Tests.No_link_yet_for_platforms_without_urls: PASSED - 'No link yet' text shown for platforms without URLs
Frontend_UI_Tests.Update_Links_button_for_posts_with_links: PASSED - 'Update Links' button shown when links exist
Frontend_UI_Tests.Add_Links_button_for_posts_without_links: PASSED - 'Add Links' button shown when no links exist
Frontend_UI_Tests.Edit_mode_shows_URL_inputs: PASSED - URL input fields for each platform in edit mode
Frontend_UI_Tests.Edit_mode_shows_analytics_inputs: PASSED - Views, Likes, Comments, Shares, New Subs inputs
Frontend_UI_Tests.Save_button_in_edit_mode: PASSED - Save button calls PUT /links API
Frontend_UI_Tests.Cancel_button_reverts_form: PASSED - Cancel button returns to view mode without saving
Frontend_UI_Tests.Analytics_summary_hidden_when_no_links: PASSED - Summary not shown for posts without links
